title: Project Supervisor (Grant Processing) Kaki Bukit | 2 Years Contract
description:
Job Scope:

  • Responsible for processing and verifying grant applications, maintaining accurate records, and communicating with applicants to gather required information.
  • Supports outreach through cold calling and on-site engagements.
  • Coordinates with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure smooth approval workflows and timely grant disbursement.
  • Handles enquiries, prepares reports for management, and provides general administrative support to the grant team.
  • Oversee projects from initiation to completion, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to scope.
  • Coordinate between teams, stakeholders, and clients to facilitate communication and collaboration.
  • Provide guidance, support, and feedback to project team members.
  • Prepare regular progress reports and present updates to management.
  • Resolve any issues or conflicts that arise during project execution.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma or equivalent
  • Detail-oriented with strong organizational and follow-up skills
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Excel, Word, Outlook)
  • Good written and verbal communication skills
  • Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment

Employment Details

  • Work Days: Monday to Friday
  • Work Hours: 8.30am – 6.00pm (Monday - Thursday), 8.30am – 5.30pm (Friday)
  • Contract Duration: 2–year contract (Renewable)
  • Work Location: Kaki Bukit/ Ubi
  • Salary Range: Up to $3500




"This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”).
e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to RMA Groups’s PDPA and e2i’s PDPA."

postedCompany.description:
RMA Contracts is a professional Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) service provider that is dedicated to delivering a spectrum of innovative BPO services using cutting-edge technology for business success.


As a one-stop integrated BPO partner, RMA Contracts is focus-driven on providing adept business solutions to streamline core business practices in today's challenging business environment in the areas of HR Consultancy, Recruitment and Manpower Outsourcing, Digitisation and Transaction Processing, Customer Relations and Managed Services.
postedCompany.name: RMA CONTRACTS PTE. LTD.
